submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-01-bare-string
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency: bare-string-group
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: marker
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=01-bare-string"
          echo "RUN_AT=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          sleep 5
          echo "DONE=01"
